feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Integration Suite
feed.subtitle: SAP Integration Suite Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Select query Issue on HANA Cloud Replicated table from S/4
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Requirement: Replicate the S/4 table into Hana Cloud and query the record from Iflow-Groovy script and modify the Json payload

(1) I did replicate on prem(S/4) table into Hana cloud.

(2) Query is working in SQL Console.

(3) I did small test via JDBC which is getting me a result what i need.

PostMan:

(4) When i implement the same query via Groovy script, its not working as expected.

(5) Groovy script:

(6) PostMan result:

Attribute value is not getting modified. Apparently query is not getting executed. Pls suggest.

Thanks

entry.title: PaymentInformation upsert in SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central through CPI
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a scenario where I have to update the bank details coming in a csv file to PaymentInformation portlet in Successfactors Employee Central to an entity PaymentInformationDetailV3.

We are receiving all the details except external code from source system. The external code is a key field in the PaymentInformationDetailV3, So I am unable to update the information with the below error.

PaymentInformationDetailV3 Upsert Failed for empId: 00002. Error msg: bad valueString [] as part of keyString [PaymentInformationV3_effectiveStartDate=datetime'2025-01-03T00%3A00%3A00',PaymentInformationV3_worker='00002',externalCode=]"

I have checked the below KBA's as well.

https://me.sap.com/notes/3000179
https://me.sap.com/notes/0002990468

The external code is an autogenerated field in Employee central, When the SF EC consultant update the information manually through import templates the external code is auto generated.

Please let me know how this field external code is to be mapped in sap cpi .

Regards,

Ramya

entry.title: Learning Strategies for Complex Groovy Scripts and Graphical Mapping
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have a question regarding building knowledge about Groovy Script or Graphical Mapping. Both can become very complex during message transformations due to context changes or complex customer requirements. My question is, is there a good way to learn this? Are there any reference books, an SAP course focusing on this, or blueprints for  recurring message transformation available? Or have you gained your experience exclusively through practice in your projects?

Kind regards,

Stefan

entry.title: Grovvy Script to read filename and usage substring operation
entry.content:
Team,

I am writing Groovy script in iFlow. Can some one helps me with a groovy script for substring operation on the filename. 

Thank you for your time.

entry.title: SAP Integration Suite: User Type for SAP CPI OData Adapter Usage
entry.content:
We are working on a CPI iFlow where we are calling an OData service which is residing in our on-prem system. Our on-prem system will be called via an APP ID(not dialog user). We created a security key for that in CPI tenant. On the adapter configuration, we are using basic auth and sending the security key. For OData configuration, when we go for connection to backend, on the popup screen it fails to fetch the metadata with error message "Please enter valid credentials". 

We later changed the type of the user(which we used in the security material) from "system" to "service" and it worked. Is there any mandate for this or can it be worked with other type of users as well? 

 

SAP Integration Suite SAP Integration Suite, managed gateway @PriyankaChak @priyankachaksap

entry.title: Event Mesh activation in Integration Suite fails
entry.content:
Hi,

I added Manage Business Events (Event Mesh) from Manage Capabilities in Integration Suite and activated it in Configure -> Event Mesh and it shows Failed.

Even if I Deactivate the Event Mesh and reactivate it, it still shows Failed.
Please let me know if you know the cause or how to solve this problem.

Best Regards,
KuroKen.

entry.title: OData V4 Error.
entry.content:
Hello SAPians,

I have a requirement where I'm making OData V4 POST call to S4HANA with standard OData api_safetydatasheetassessment. Now there is an extension to this API i.e SAP__self.UpdateSafetyDataSheetDocumentDetails which I'm providing manually because not getting this in Select Entity & Define Operations (attaching SS).

 

When I'm deploying the interface, I'm getting below error.

If anyone has worked on Product Compliance interfaces, please help me on this.

Please suggest some solution for this.


P.S : Already tried converting JSON to XML.
Also tried with HTTP adapter.  

 

Thanks in advance!! 😊

 


SAP Cloud Platform, industry edition, client libraries   SAP BTP, ABAP environment   SAP Integration Suite   Cloud Integration   SAP Business Technology Platform

entry.title: Processing messages from dead message queue of SAP event mesh
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

What is the best approach to process the messages from a dead message queue in SAP Event Mesh?

Does it make sense to me to create another iFlow to periodically read from DMQ using REST and process/put the message back to the main queue? Is there any manual way to put the messages from DMQ to main queue?

Thanks for your help.

entry.title: Replacement of Invalid JSON Element that fails JSON to XML Conversion doesn't work
entry.content:
Hello, 

I have a payload like this:

{
"Name": "111000",
"UniqueName": "[Account].[Account].[GAPP Total G&A^G&A - MB^G&A DIRECT^G&A EMPLOYEE COSTS^29255]",
"Type": "Regular",
"Ordinal": 10767,
"IsPlaceholder": false,
"Weight": 1,
"Attributes": {
"Caption": "611055",
"Active": 1,
"Ignore Volume?": "Y",
"Variance Sign": -1,
"Forecast Input": "611055",
"RuleBased": "Y",
"OMGA": "GA",
"Legacy Element": "6110130 - VACATION ACCRUAL-LABOR",
"NameCode": "ACCRUAL-VACATION-LABOR (611055)",
"CodeName": "611055 - ACCRUAL-VACATION-LABOR",
"CodeNameLegacy": "611055 - ACCRUAL-VACATION-LABOR (6110130 )",
"Name": "ACCRUAL-VACATION-LABOR"
}
},

============================================================

Conversion of this payload to XML fails due to "Ignore Volume?" element:

============================================================

Tried this groovy script:

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message;

def Message processData(Message message) {
// Get the body as a String (assuming it's already a String)
def body = message.getBody(String)

// Perform replacements
def newBody = body.replaceAll("Ignore Volume?", "IgnoreVolume")

// Set the modified body back to the message
message.setBody(newBody)

return message
}

============================================================

Result:

Payload is remaining un-altered !

==========================================================

What is that I am missing.

 

Thanks,
SB

entry.title: SAP Integration Suite API Management mTLS on API Proxy
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I want to know where to check client certificate uploaded for mtls. As per the help sap help mentioned after creating incident to enable mtls we need to share client certificate with sap in the shared drive provided by sap. I want to know where can we see that path which sap uploaded the client certificate.

Regards

Venkat.

entry.title: B2B monitoring API in SAP Integration suite
entry.content: Is there any standard API available for B2B monitoring in sap integration suite

entry.title: SAP Integration suite
entry.content:
Hi community, is there any way to connect SAP integration cloud tenant with the servers(web socket supported) through websocket communication ?

Regards,

Mohan Sai

entry.title: SAP CPI HTTP Adapter not filtering data
entry.content:
Hi, 

I have a scenario where I invoke a URL over HTTP and pass filter criteria.  Data set is like a set a cost centers and each cost center has some header fields and Attributes as a child node. In the Attributes a field by name "Active" is set to 1 for all valid records.  Objective is to get only records that are active that are set as 1.

Query: Attributes/Active=1

Issue: With this setting all cost center records are coming back and not getting filtered.  If an entry on the partner system is maintained without Attributes at all or without setting ACTIVE field they are being returned.  This is causing a issue since the process goes into a bad status.

Thanks in advance for any resolution.

SBapanapalli

entry.title: Authorization Error Setting Up SOAP Connection from SAP S/4HANA Cloud to SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm currently setting up an integration between SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and SAP Integration Suite (CPI) using a SOAP 1.X Sender Adapter. My goal is to send payment data from SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud to Integration Suite (Scope item 2YM), but I'm encountering a 401 Unauthorized error.

Setup:

  1. Communication User Setup:

    • Created a technical communication user in SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

  2. Communication System Setup:

    • Created a communication system in SAP S/4HANA Cloud.
    • Entered what I believe is the correct host name (e.g. iFlow generated endpoint URL excluding Path).

  3. Communication Arrangement Setup:

    • Created a communication arrangement using the scenario SAP_COM_0256 (Bank Connectivity API).
    • Selected the correct communication system and technical user.

  4. Testing the Integration:

    • I'm testing the SOAP request using SOAPUI with Basic Authentication using the technical communication user's credentials. (This is also set up in Security Material in CPI).

Questions:

  1. How can I confirm that the communication user has the correct roles and authorizations for this setup?
  2. Is there any additional configuration needed in the iFlow on SAP Integration Suite to accept Basic Authentication?
  3. Could the 401 error be caused by an incorrect host name in the communication system setup?
  4. Would it be better to use Client Certificate Authentication, and if so, how should I set it up?
  5. Is the "SAP Process Integration Runtime" service mandatory for this setup, or can I establish the connection without it?

Any insights or guidance on resolving this 401 Unauthorized error would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you for your help!

entry.title: backup artifacts with external tools
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

I would like to ask you. If you are using some external version controller for backup resources  in integration suite? 

My understanding  is once iflow is deleted it is not possible to restore. 

 

As test I developed iflow which downloaded packages as a zip and store them to SharePoint. But I would need more sophisticate solution in case of versioning. 

 

Thanks

Radek

entry.title: Message Mapping Vs XSLT Mapping vs Groovy Script Which is the best option to use in SAP CPI IFlow?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Which is the best option to use in SAP CPI for development based on priority from SAP? Could you please suggest either Message Mapping, XSLT Mapping, or Groovy Script?

Regards,
Naveen

entry.title: Call Business Object Interface from outside S4
entry.content:
Hi all,

I want to Create a Billing Plan from Integration Suite. I was looking for APIs but did not find any. The only thing I found is this BO https://api.sap.com/bointerface/PCE_I_CABILLGPLNTP_2 

My question is it possible to call it from Cloud Integration? If so, How can we do that

 

thanks

entry.title: On Integration Suite page, left menu items are not visible except "Home"
entry.content:
Hi Guys,

I can see only "Home" items on Integration Suite home page but have no idea how to set another left menu items  like "Discover", "Design", "Test" etc.

Please help me~~

entry.title: On Integration Suite page, left menu items are not visible ("Role Collections" screenshot)
entry.content: Attached my "Role Collections" screenshot

entry.title: Integration suite trail error
entry.content:
Hello ,

I recently started working with trail session, But after few days of gap again i started opening integration suite trail page then i am getting the following error.

No client with requested id: sb-it-prov!t26655

 

Authorization Request Error
There was an error. The request for authorization was invalid.

 

 

Can anyone provide me hint how to open this?

my url is as follows.

https://5079636etrial.integrationsuite-trial.cfapps.us10-001.hana.ondemand.com/shell/design

regards,

Karim.
